01-10-2025 Jubilant POSTAL MANAGEMENT Approve JFL FOR FOR The company seeks approval for ESOP 2025 under which up to 5,000,000
Foodwor BALLOT Employees Stock options can be granted. The overall dilution of the scheme for 5,000,000
ks Ltd. Option Scheme options is ~0.76% on the expanded capital base as on 30 June 2025. The
2025 (ESOP 2025) scheme will be implemented through a trust by secondary acquisition of
under which upto shares. The exercise price shall be determined by the NRC which shall not be
5,000,000 stock less than face value and not more than 50% of the market price of shares as
options will be on grant date. Where the exercise price is at a significant discount to market
granted price (generally of more than 20%), we expect vesting of stock-based grants
to be based on certain pre-defined performance targets that must be
disclosed. As per the notice, vesting of options will be based on achievement
of certain company-level performance metrics including revenue, revenue
growth, EBITDA/EPS, etc; as well as certain individual-level performance
metrics including strategic contribution, leadership effectiveness, etc. The
company has stated that it will disclose the performance criteria used for the
vesting of options, along with the percentage of achievement against the
total number of options granted, in the annual report. The company has
clarified that they will disclose the achievement against targets for each of
the company level performance metrics in the annual report. We expect the
